title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud offers a low-code platform for building AI applications by combining corporate data with cloud databases and Gemini. The service enables rapid development of intelligent features like natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations without requiring deep AI expertise.
writeup: The video walks through Google Cloud's low-code platform for building AI applications that combine corporate data with cloud databases and Gemini. It targets small teams building intelligent features without deep AI expertise. The concrete takeaways: the approach supports natural language interfaces, hybrid and image search, and recommendations, and it emphasizes rapid development by joining existing corporate data to managed databases.
